title: Morning Tease
body: Good morning, gorgeous. I had a dream about you last night... but I'll only tell you the details in person 😏

title: Countdown
body: Only {hours} hours until I see you. I'm already planning something fun for us tonight...

title: Distraction
body: I can't focus on anything today because I keep thinking about the way you looked at me last night.

title: Challenge Accepted
body: I bet you can't make me blush tonight. Prove me wrong?

title: Sweet Trap
body: I made a list of things I want to do with you tonight. Number 4 might surprise you.

title: Dress Code
body: Tonight has a dress code: wear something you know drives me crazy. You have exactly one guess which outfit I mean.

title: Menu Preview
body: Tonight's menu: appetizer is a slow kiss. Main course is a surprise. Dessert? That's entirely up to you.

title: Reward System
body: For every sweet thing you say to me today, I'll remember it tonight... and reward you accordingly.

title: Late Night Promise
body: Don't make plans for after midnight. I have ideas that require your complete attention.

title: Temperature Check
body: On a scale of 1 to 'come home right now' — how much do you miss me? Because I'm at a solid 11.

title: Secret Mission
body: I hid something under your pillow. Don't look until tonight. The instructions are very specific.

title: Forbidden Thought
body: I just had a thought about you that I definitely cannot say out loud in public. Remind me to whisper it to you later.

title: Gentle Reminder
body: I love the way your hand feels in mine. Such a simple thing, but it makes everything better.

title: Your Scent
body: I found one of your shirts and it still smells like you. I may have held it a little too long.

title: Slow Evening
body: Tonight I want to take things slow. No rushing. Just us, low light, and nowhere to be.

title: Warm Bath
body: How about a warm bath together tonight? I'll light candles. You bring the music.

title: Body Language
body: I love watching you when you don't know I'm looking. The way you move is hypnotic.

title: Massage Promise
body: You've been working so hard. Tonight I'm giving you a full massage — no time limit, no interruptions. Just my hands and you.

title: Silk Sheets
body: I changed the sheets to the silk ones. Just thought you should have something to look forward to.

title: Candlelit Plans
body: Dinner by candlelight tonight? And after dinner... we'll see where the night takes us. No plans, just presence.

title: Your Skin
body: I keep thinking about the warmth of your skin against mine. The way our bodies fit together like they were made for each other.

title: Trace the Lines
body: Tonight I want to trace every line of your body with my fingertips. Slowly. Like reading a love letter written in Braille.

title: Lost in You
body: When you hold me close and I feel your heartbeat against mine — that's my favorite place in the entire world. I need that tonight.

title: Every Inch
body: I want to memorize you tonight. Every curve, every breath, every sound you make. Like it's the first time all over again.

title: Direct Truth
body: I want you. Not in a subtle way. Not in a poetic way. I just want you. Now.

title: Can't Wait
body: The second you walk through that door, I'm not letting go. Fair warning.

title: Claim
body: You're mine tonight. Every minute. Every breath. I've been thinking about this all day.

title: No Patience
body: I used to be a patient person. Then I met you. Now the hours between us feel like torture.

title: Against the Wall
body: I keep imagining pulling you close and pinning you against the wall. Your back against it. My eyes locked on yours.

title: Commanding Tone
body: When you get home, don't say a word. Just come to me. I'll handle the rest.

title: My Rules
body: Tonight we play by my rules. Rule one: you don't get to touch me until I say so. Think you can handle that?

title: Unfinished
body: Remember what we started last night? We're finishing that. And I'm not being gentle about it.

title: Edge
body: I want to take you right to the edge tonight. Hold you there. Make you wait. And only when you beg — then I'll let go.

title: No Escape
body: Lock the door. Turn off the lights. You and I have unfinished business, and I plan to take my time with you.

title: Primal
body: Sometimes I don't want to be gentle. Sometimes I want to feel every ounce of us — raw, unfiltered, nothing held back.

title: Mark
body: By the end of tonight, I want you to still feel me tomorrow. Every time you move, you'll remember exactly what happened.

title: Random Thought
body: Random thought: you're really cute when you're concentrating. Just wanted you to know that.

title: Would You Rather
body: Would you rather: I give you a back rub tonight, or you give me one? Choose wisely — there's a plot twist either way.

title: First Touch
body: Remember our first touch? I felt electricity. Honestly? I still do. Every single time.

title: Morning Light
body: You look so beautiful in the morning light. I wish I could freeze that moment and live in it forever.

title: Magnetic Pull
body: Being near you and not touching you is physically painful. You have no idea the effect you have on me.

title: Confession Hour
body: I have a confession. I haven't been able to stop thinking about that thing you did last time. I need an encore.

title: Double Dare
body: Double dare: tell me your biggest fantasy. If you're brave enough, I'll tell you mine. No judgment. Only fire.

title: Timer Set
body: I just set a timer for 3 hours. When it goes off, meet me in the bedroom. Don't ask questions. Just trust me.

title: Dance With Me
body: I want to slow dance with you in the kitchen tonight. No music needed — just our heartbeats.

title: Blindfold Trust
body: Would you trust me to blindfold you tonight? I want you to experience me through touch alone. Nothing else.

title: Emoji Dare
body: Describe what you want tonight using only emojis. I'll try to decode your message... then make it happen.

title: All Night
body: No alarm tomorrow. No plans. Just us, tangled together, with all the time in the world. That's my perfect night.

title: Hunger
body: I'm not just missing you. I'm hungry for you. There's a difference. And you know exactly what I mean.

title: After Hours
body: Everyone sees the polished version of us. But I prefer the after-hours version. When it's just us. Unfiltered.
